docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VICENTE, EDYN AS TO DEFENDANT AYER, KRISTEN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VICENTE, EDYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AYER, KRISTEN AN INDIVIDUAL $24,221.24 PRINCIPAL, $10.79 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,602.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VICENTE, EDYN AS TO ASSIGNEE DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS LABOR COMISSIONER'S OFFICE
